# Foundation Module Strategy Instructions
# Version: 1.0
# Last Updated: Auto-generated by learning loop

## Strategy: Passive Growth & Congressional Tracking

### Core Logic
1. Daily: Monitor US Congress financial disclosures for high-profile member trades.
2. Map traded stocks to crypto tokens via config/token_map.yaml.
3. If mapping exists, execute BUY order (10% of Foundation pool per trade).
4. Maintain dividend portfolio rebalancing weekly.
5. Stake stablecoins in Aave and ETH in Lido for DeFi yield.
6. Reinvest all dividends, staking rewards, and interest (DRIP).

### Congressional Tracking Rules
- Track only high-profile members: Pelosi, Crenshaw, Emmer, Blackburn, Carpenter, Norman
- Minimum transaction value: $1,000
- Confidence scoring: Track 90-day forward returns for each politician's trades
- Weight signals by politician confidence score (0-100)
- Do NOT follow trades with confidence score below 50
- Log every political trade with entry date and tracked return

### Dividend Portfolio
- Assets: ARCC (25%), SDIV (25%), O (20%), ENB (15%), ABBV (15%)
- Weekly rebalance: sell overweight, buy underweight (tolerance: +/-5%)
- Monitor dividend payout ratios via Yahoo Finance API
- Flag any stock with payout ratio >100% for manual review
- Auto-reinvest dividends into the same asset (DRIP)

### DeFi Yield Strategy
- Stablecoin staking: Deploy to Aave pool (USDC/USDT)
- ETH staking: Deposit to Lido (stETH)
- Monitor APY changes weekly; switch pools if alternative offers >50% improvement
- Keep 10% of Foundation pool as liquid for rebalancing
- Never stake more than 60% of Foundation pool in DeFi protocols

### Risk Management
- Maximum single DeFi protocol exposure: 40% of Foundation pool
- Diversify across at least 2 DeFi protocols
- Monitor protocol TVL; reduce exposure if TVL drops >30% in 7 days
- Weekly portfolio review: rebalance if any asset deviates >10% from target weight
- Maintain minimum 5% cash reserve for opportunities
